logical_pins.name: VCCINT
logical_pins.description: Internal supply voltage, 0.825V to 0.876V (0.850V typical) or 0.698V to 0.742V (0.720V typical for -1LI devices)

logical_pins.name: VCCINT_IO
logical_pins.description: Internal supply voltage for the I/O banks, 0.825V to 0.876V (0.850V typical) or 0.698V to 0.742V (0.720V typical for -1LI devices)

logical_pins.name: VCCAUX
logical_pins.description: Auxiliary supply voltage, 1.746V to 1.854V (1.800V typical)

logical_pins.name: VCCBRAM
logical_pins.description: Block RAM supply voltage, 0.825V to 0.876V (0.850V typical)

logical_pins.name: VCCO
logical_pins.description: Output drivers supply voltage. HD I/O banks: 1.140V to 3.400V. HP I/O banks and configuration bank 0: 0.950V to 1.900V.

logical_pins.name: VCCAUX_IO
logical_pins.description: Auxiliary I/O supply voltage, 1.746V to 1.854V (1.800V typical)

logical_pins.name: VREF
logical_pins.description: Input reference voltage for HP I/O banks

logical_pins.name: VBATT
logical_pins.description: Key memory battery backup supply, 1.000V to 1.890V

logical_pins.name: VMGTAVCC
logical_pins.description: Analog supply voltage for transceiver circuits, 0.873V to 0.927V (0.900V typical)

logical_pins.name: VMGTAVTT
logical_pins.description: Analog supply voltage for transceiver termination circuits, 1.164V to 1.236V (1.200V typical)

logical_pins.name: VMGTVCCAUX
logical_pins.description: Auxiliary analog Quad PLL (QPLL) voltage supply for transceivers, 1.746V to 1.854V (1.800V typical)

logical_pins.name: VMGTAVTTRCAL
logical_pins.description: Analog supply voltage for the resistor calibration circuit of the transceiver column, 1.164V to 1.236V (1.200V typical)

logical_pins.name: VCCADC
logical_pins.description: System Monitor supply relative to GNDADC, 1.746V to 1.854V (1.800V typical)

logical_pins.name: VREFP
logical_pins.description: System Monitor reference input relative to GNDADC, 1.200V to 1.300V (1.250V typical)

logical_pins.name: D[31:00]
logical_pins.description: Configuration data bus used in SelectMAP and other parallel configuration modes

logical_pins.name: CCLK
logical_pins.description: Configuration clock

logical_pins.name: DONE
logical_pins.description: Configuration done signal, typically open-drain

logical_pins.name: INIT_B
logical_pins.description: Initialization status and configuration error signal, typically open-drain

logical_pins.name: PROGRAM_B
logical_pins.description: Asynchronous configuration reset

logical_pins.name: POR_OVERRIDE
logical_pins.description: Power-on reset override pin, must be tied to GND or VCCINT

logical_pins.name: M[2:0]
logical_pins.description: Configuration mode selection pins

logical_pins.name: TMS
logical_pins.description: JTAG Test Mode Select

logical_pins.name: TDI
logical_pins.description: JTAG Test Data Input

logical_pins.name: TCK
logical_pins.description: JTAG Test Clock

logical_pins.name: TDO
logical_pins.description: JTAG Test Data Output

logical_pins.name: A[28:00]
logical_pins.description: Address bus for BPI Master Flash configuration mode

logical_pins.name: FCS_B
logical_pins.description: Flash Chip Select for SPI or BPI configuration

logical_pins.name: MOSI
logical_pins.description: Master Out Slave In for SPI configuration

logical_pins.name: RXP/RXN
logical_pins.description: Differential transceiver receive pair

logical_pins.name: TXP/TXN
logical_pins.description: Differential transceiver transmit pair

logical_pins.name: VMGTREFCLK
logical_pins.description: Transceiver reference clock absolute input voltage

logical_pins.name: VP/VN
logical_pins.description: Dedicated differential analog input pair for the System Monitor

logical_pins.name: DXP/DXN
logical_pins.description: Temperature-sensing diode pins
